_publications._publicationTitle: Cognitive dysfunction in NF1 knock-out mice may result from altered vesicular trafficking of APP/DRD3 complex.

_contextSnippet: members of the kinesin motor protein family were downregulated in the Nf1 +/- mice at post natal days 15 and 20
details: Kinesin motor protein family members were downregulated at postnatal days 15 and 20
